title: UserActivitySession
description: This represents a user session performed on a specific device at a certain time over a period of time.

activities.description: Represents a detailed view into each of the activity in this session.

dataSource.description: The data source of a hit. By default, hits sent from analytics.js are reported as "web" and hits sent from the mobile SDKs are reported as "app". These values can be overridden in the Measurement Protocol.

deviceCategory.description: The type of device used: "mobile", "tablet" etc.

platform.description: Platform on which the activity happened: "android", "ios" etc.

sessionDate.description: Date of this session in ISO-8601 format.
